user.title: Project Fronkensteen v{version}
user.description:
Five AI personas run your house. This installer will copy all required files to your Home Assistant configuration.

**Prerequisites:**
- Pyscript integration installed and configured
- At least one LLM API key (OpenAI or OpenRouter)
- At least one media_player speaker entity

Click Submit to continue.

features.title: Feature Selection
features.description: Select which feature groups to install. Core infrastructure is always included. You can change this later via Reconfigure.

data.voice: Voice Pipeline (agent routing, handoff, whisper, TTS, ducking)
data.bedtime: Bedtime & Sleep (routines, detection, wake-up, wind-down, schedule)
data.budget: Budget & Cost Tracking (LLM/TTS/STT limits, alerts, fallback)
data.presence: Presence & Identity (room inference, patterns, privacy gate)
data.creative: Creative & Social (banter, debates, therapy, interviews, escalation)

household.title: Household Setup
household.description: Configure your primary user. Additional household members can be added later via the per-user helpers package.

data.person_slug: Person slug (must match your person.* entity, e.g. 'john')
data.tts_pronunciation: TTS pronunciation (how your name should be spoken, e.g. 'John')

speakers.title: Speaker Setup
speakers.description: Configure your default speaker for TTS output. Additional speakers and zone mappings can be configured in tts_speaker_config.json after installation.

confirm.title: Ready to Install

reconfigure_features.title: Feature Selection
reconfigure_features.description: Toggle feature groups on or off. Newly enabled groups will be installed. Disabling a group does NOT remove its files.

error.pyscript_not_installed: Pyscript integration is not installed. Install it via HACS first, then retry.

abort.reconfigure_successful: Configuration updated successfully. Restart Home Assistant to apply changes.
